segments.text: You know you're going to eat one or two up airs, and it's little damage, but even then, a big sting still hurts.
A little damage can make for a big result, okay?
So all of that is being played nicely.

full_text: You know you're going to eat one or two up airs, and it's little damage, but even then, a big sting still hurts. A little damage can make for a big result, okay? Yes! So all of that is being played nicely.
